description_long: This is a single-story log cabin with a broad, dark hip roof featuring deep overhangs and exposed rafters. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden logs, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. Large, multi-pane windows are symmetrically arranged on the visible facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The foundation appears to be made of stone or concrete, providing a solid base and slight elevation above ground level. A covered porch with wooden railings and steps is present at the main entrance, enhancing the welcoming character of the cabin. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional log cabins, blending natural materials with functional architectural elements.
description: A rustic log cabin with a wide, dark hip roof, large windows, and a covered front porch, set on a stone foundation.
description_view_0: This view shows the cabin's side and front, highlighting the deep roof overhang, multiple large windows, and the covered porch at the entrance.
description_view_1: The front view displays the symmetrical arrangement of windows and the central covered porch, emphasizing the inviting entryway.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the opposite side and front, again showing the prominent windows and the extended roof, with the porch partially visible.
description_view_3: The rear view features a wide roof overhang and a set of windows, with the porch and main entrance visible at the bottom center.
attribute_roof_type: hip roof with deep overhangs and exposed rafters, covered in dark shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple large, rectangular windows symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, grouped in pairs or sets of three, with multi-pane divisions
attribute_door_placement: Single main door centered on the front facade, accessed via the covered porch
